pi_items.source: Found in setup_artifactory.sh and task_utils.sh; verified to be the default repo in Artifactory OSS.
Found in setup_task.sh which creates this file on the Desktop.
Verified via setup_task.sh, which downloads commons-lang3 and commons-io jars from Maven central, and places them under libs/ before zipping.
Hardcoded default credentials found in setup_artifactory.sh and task_utils.sh.
Hardcoded default credentials found in setup_artifactory.sh and task_utils.sh.
Standard port for Artifactory Web UI, referenced in task_utils.sh, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires deploying an archive named migration-bundle.zip to the example-repo-local repository. The archive contains two real artifacts downloaded from Maven Central: libs/commons-lang3.jar and libs/commons-io.jar. These must be exploded upon deployment. The Artifactory instance is accessible at http://localhost:8082 with the credentials admin/password.
